name: OV-MAP: Open-Vocabulary Zero-Shot 3D Instance Segmentation Map for Robots

description: arXiv:2506.11585v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce OV-MAP, a novel approach to open-world 3D mapping for mobile robots by integrating open-features into 3D maps to enhance object recognition capabilities. A significant challenge arises when overlapping features from adjacent voxels reduce instance-level precision, as features spill over voxel boundaries, blending neighboring...
author: Juno Kim, Yesol Park, Hye-Jung Yoon, Byoung-Tak Zhang
